title: optimizer treats all the functions with no or constant parameters as constant
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (id Int32, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT generateUUIDv4() AS my_uuid_id, generateUUIDv4() AS my_uuid_value FROM test1;
CREATE TABLE test2 (num Int32, str String DEFAULT 'default') ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY num;
SELECT num, if(str IS NULL, 'default', str) AS str_value FROM test2;
key_bug_features: optimizer treats functions with constant parameters as constants
